description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull/push that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow has three ubuntu-latest jobs: build_ibamr_archlinux_016, build_ibamr_archlinux_016_autotools, and build_ibamr_ubuntu_016. Each job uses a Docker container, checks out the repository, verifies clang-format, and populates the ccache. The jobs then configure, compile, and test IBAMR using either CMake or autotools, and compile sample projects.
